mapper.select: SELECT MIN(uc.id) as id, c.coupon_id as couponId, c.title, c.scope_type as scopeType, c.threshold, c.discount_amount as discountAmount, c.end_time as endTime, COUNT(uc.id) as userNum FROM user_coupons uc INNER JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND #{totalPrice} > c.threshold AND c.end_time > #{now} AND ( c.scope_type = 1 OR (c.scope_type = 2 AND c.scope_id = #{hotelId}) ) GROUP BY c.coupon_id, c.title, c.scope_type, c.threshold, c.discount_amount, c.end_time

SELECT c.coupon_id, c.title, c.scope_type, c.scope_id, c.threshold, c.discount_amount, c.stock, c.max_per_user, c.end_time, c.status,
IF(uc.user_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS is_received, IFNULL(uc.received_count, 0) AS received_count FROM coupons c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT coupon_id, user_id, MAX(status) AS max_status, COUNT(id) AS received_count FROM user_coupons WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY coupon_id, user_id ) uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id
AND c.status = 1 AND c.end_time > NOW()
AND c.scope_type = 1
AND c.scope_type = 2
AND (uc.user_id IS NULL OR uc.received_count < c.max_per_user)
AND uc.user_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.coupon_id DESC
